title: Abu Bakr's Appearance
description: Abu Zayd-`Ali b. Muhammad, according to his isnad, which has been mentioned before: Abu Bakr died at the age of sixty -three years on Monday, z1 Jumada al-Akhirah (22 August 634). The cause of his death was that the Jews fed him poison in a grain of rice; it is also said in porridge (jadhidhah). Al-Harith b. Kaladah684 took some

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 11
